===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Roxanne anime.png|thumb|220px|Roxanne in ''[[Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire]]'']]
====History====
Roxanne is a top graduate of the [[Rustboro City]] [[Pokémon Trainers' School]], and now teaches the academy's beginner class. She was granted the position of Rustboro [[Gym Leader]] because of her excellent record at the academy, and she allows some of the school's students to undertake internships at the [[Rustboro Gym]].

Roxanne debuted in the {{aniseries|RS}} episode ''[[AG015|Gonna Rule The School!]]''. {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} met her when [[Max]] found a lost {{p|Poliwag}} that was soon revealed to belong to the Pokémon Trainers' School. Roxanne then invited the group to the school before Ash's [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}. Roxanne admitted that she was going to be busy teaching her students until tomorrow, and promised she would battle Ash the day after.

Ash, Max, and {{an|Brock}} joined Roxanne's students the next day after being invited by the principal, while {{an|May}} studied with the {{pkmn|Contest}} class. {{TRT}} arrived and stole the school's Pokémon, but under Roxanne's watchful eye, her students and Max were able to recover them. She then called on her {{p|Geodude}} and sent Team Rocket blasting off.

In ''[[AG016|The Winner by a Nosepass]]'', Ash battled Roxanne at the Rustboro Gym while being filmed by some of Roxanne's students. {{AP|Treecko}} went up against Roxanne's Geodude, but was defeated by its powerful {{m|Mega Punch}} attacks. {{AP|Pikachu}} was able to defeat both of her Pokémon through a combination of pure electrical power and its newly learned {{m|Iron Tail}} technique, which took Roxanne by surprise. Afterwards, Roxanne gave Ash the {{Badge|Stone}} in recognition of his victory.

Roxanne is familiar with {{an|Professor Oak}}, as he gives live remote lectures to the students at the school. She also knew about Brock and the [[Pewter Gym]] before she met him, as the Pewter Gym shares her {{type|Rock}} specialty.

She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[AG075|Whiscash and Ash]]''.

====Character====
Roxanne enjoys fostering young {{pkmn|Trainer}}s. She offers them real-life experiences, such as filming her [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}s and taking her students on excursions. Roxanne values collaboration, confidence, and consideration in her students and earmarks those qualities as critical to a Trainer's success with handling their Pokémon.

She relies on her Pokémon's defenses to overcome a challenger's offensive techniques. Roxanne is perceptive and quickly understands a Trainer's battle strategy when she first sees it. Both of her Pokémon have a wide variety of [[move]]s, allowing Roxanne to launch a range of combinations that take advantage of her opponent's weaknesses.

Geodude easily defeated {{AP|Treecko}} with two {{m|Mega Punch}} attacks despite the [[type]] disadvantage and Ash's best efforts, since Treecko did not know any {{type|Grass}} [[move]]s at the time. {{AP|Pikachu}}, however, managed to defeat Geodude with {{m|Thunder}}{{tt|*|Which should be impossible due to Geodude's immunity against electricity}}.
